modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Delay when posting meal plan transactions in Transact.

full_description_text:  
So, there’s this issue with Transact where it takes a long time to post transactions for changing meal plans. The user was just trying to update their meal plan, but it’s super slow. Not sure what’s causing it, but it’s really frustrating!
short_description: Delay when posting meal plan transactions in Transact.
description: So, there’s this issue with Transact where it takes a long time to post transactions for changing meal plans. The user was just trying to update their meal plan, but it’s super slow. Not sure what’s causing it, but it’s really frustrating!
